# Trustco Curtain & Door Factory (مصنع الثقة للستائر والأبواب)

> Trustco is a premier manufacturer and provider of custom premium curtains and modern doors, serving clients across Bahrain and Saudi Arabia since 1990.
> مصنع الثقة هو مصنع ومزود رائد للستائر الفاخرة والأبواب العصرية، يخدم العملاء في البحرين والمملكة العربية السعودية منذ عام 1990م.

## Core Pages / الصفحات الرئيسية

- [Homepage / الرئيسية](https://trustco.com/index.html): Overview of services, trust guarantees, and key performance stats (2500+ completed projects, 25+ years of experience).
- [About Us / من نحن](https://trustco.com/about.html): Company history, factory details (6000 m² factory space, 20+ product types), and our commitment to quality.
- [Our Products / منتجاتنا](https://trustco.com/services.html): Full catalog of premium curtains (Zebra, Roller, Wooden blinds, Blackout) and modern doors (Accordion doors and more).
- [Contact Us / تواصل معنا](https://trustco.com/contact.html): Contact information, location details in Hamala, Bahrain (Building 975, Road 1216, Block 1012), phone support (+973 1758 0191), email (Trust.Fact@hotmail.com), operating hours (Saturday – Thursday: 9:00 – 17:00), and our inquiry form.
